title: Chemistry Stand
description: An alternative to the Brewing Stand capable of making items that aren't Potions. Used in conjunction with mods like Ars Elixirum.
body:
An alternative to the Brewing Stand that can only make items that aren't directly potions, such as Cobblemon medicine and Alchemancy Alchemical Extract. Made to be used in conjunction with mods that make these recipes inaccessible by overriding the Brewing Stand's functionality, such as Ars Elixirum.

A config is provided by the mod that allows the Chemistry Stand to also brew vanilla Potions.
